project.name: VulnSignal
project.description: Daily CVE, KEV and documented LLM disclosure trends

coverage.notice: This product uses NVD data feeds and is not endorsed or certified by the NVD.

llmDiscovery.label: Reported LLM-assisted disclosure events
llmDiscovery.basis: The headline is the largest CVE count reported by one first-party LLM-assisted programme. Counts from different programmes remain separate because the sources do not support reliable deduplication. This section represents reported LLM-assisted disclosure events, not a scientifically complete measurement of LLM vulnerability-discovery performance. CVE, NVD and KEV do not record discovery method consistently.

programReports.exclusionReason: Programme counts are not summed because public aggregates do not provide a cross-programme deduplication key.

comparison.note: Compares two adjacent 36-month publication periods ending at the latest complete month. Exploit-reference shares use records matured for 180 days. EPSS values apply the current FIRST score snapshot and the project's EPSS ≥ 0.1 threshold to CVEs published in each period; they are not historical EPSS scores. The comparison does not measure an LLM discovery rate.
